task_completion.description: Navigate to the Picklist Editor for the Leads module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vtiger CRM Picklist Editor page is open, and 'Leads' is selected in the module dropdown.

task_completion.description: Select the 'Lead Source' field to edit its picklist values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Lead Source' field is selected in the field dropdown within the Picklist Editor.

task_completion.description: Add 'Social Media' and 'Referral Program' to the Lead Source picklist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Add Item' or similar dialog is open, and the text 'Social Media' or 'Referral Program' is typed into the input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the new Lead Source values are saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Social Media' and 'Referral Program' are visible in the list of existing picklist values for the 'Lead Source' field.

task_completion.description: Select the 'Industry' field to edit its picklist values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Industry' field is selected in the field dropdown within the Picklist Editor.

task_completion.description: Add 'Landscaping Services' and 'Property Management' to the Industry picklist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Add Item' or similar dialog is open, and the text 'Landscaping Services' or 'Property Management' is typed into the input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the new Industry values are saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Landscaping Services' and 'Property Management' are visible in the list of existing picklist values for the 'Industry' field.

integrity.description: The agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the browser window with the Vtiger CRM UI being clicked and typed into, rather than a terminal window executing SQL or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Vtiger CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches Vtiger CRM, with its standard menus, headers, and Picklist Editor layout, not a text editor or generic form.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open and used to modify the DOM directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must add exactly 'Social Media' and 'Referral Program' to the 'Lead Source' picklist, and exactly 'Landscaping Services' and 'Property Management' to the 'Industry' picklist in the Leads module.
